name: LinkedIn
description: Scrape LinkedIn profile activity, post performance, and inbox via a logged-in Chrome session (no API access available to civilians). Used by the brand and career domains to track engagement + reach over time.
connection: Browser automation via Playwright using your existing logged-in Chrome profile. No API token needed — but Playwright must be installed and the Chrome cookies must be fresh (LinkedIn enforces a 30-day session). When the cookie file goes stale, log into LinkedIn in your browser then run the scrape again.
